name: Speakerman Vs Skibidi Toilet
description: The game is set in a post-apocalyptic world where the Speakerman and the Skibidi Toilet are the two most powerful forces. The Speakerman is a giant robot with a powerful speaker that can emit destructive sound waves.
instructions: Control PC Use the arrow keys on the keyboard to target the Skibidi Toilet Remember do not shoot the speakerman Mobile Use the joystick to target the Skibidi Toilet Remember do not shoot the speakerman
tags: Adventure, Best Games, NapTech Games, Shoot, Shooter, Skibidi, Skibidi Toilet
